MASHSHIELDER-MASH_SHIELDER.title: Mash Kyrielight
MASHSHIELDER-MASH_SHIELDER.description: A Demi-Servant fused with the Heroic Spirit Galahad. She raises the great shield Lord Camelot, hoarding Block that never crumbles and unleashing it as devastating Noble Phantasms.
MASHSHIELDER-MASH_SHIELDER.goldMonologue: Chaldea never paid me a salary... Senpai, is this what they call a budget?
MASHSHIELDER-MASH_SHIELDER.eventDeathPre: A familiar white creature squeaks somewhere far away... Fou spends his miracle once more, and Mash opens her eyes.
MASHSHIELDER-MASH_SHIELDER.aromaPrincipl: It smells like the Chaldea cafeteria... like sandwiches. Mash feels at ease.
MASHSHIELDER-MASH_SHIELDER.cardsModifier: Play with Mash Kyrielight's card pool.
MASHSHIELDER-MASH_SHIELDER.banter.dead.e: I'm sorry, Senpai... I couldn't protect you...
